hooks.prompt:
ztl_coder plugin loaded.

**Available Skills:**
- ztl-coder-commander - Main orchestrator
- ztl-coder-brainstormer - Design exploration
- ztl-coder-planner - Implementation plans
- ztl-coder-implementer - Execute tasks
- ztl-coder-reviewer - Code review
- ztl-coder-executor - Orchestrate implement→review
- ztl-coder-ledger-creator - Continuity ledgers
- ztl-coder-project-initializer - Project initialization
- ztl-coder-artifact-searcher - Search history

**Commands:**
- /ztl-coder-init - Initialize project docs
- /ztl-coder-ledger - Create/update continuity ledger
- /ztl-coder-search - Search past work

**Workflow:** Brainstorm → Plan → Implement → Review
